data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Add a disambiguation note in complexity-gate.md distinguishing it from complexity-evaluator.md. The note should clarify: complexity-gate.md = shared prompt for inline LLM-based complexity threshold check (used in brainstorm/implementation-plan); complexity-evaluator.md = named sub-agent definition (dispatched via dso:complexity-evaluator). Add AC: verify complexity-gate.md contains a disambiguation comment in the header.
